setup_context.description: Caller context JSON: {mode:'create'|'edit', description:string, source_dir?:string, publish_intent:'cloud'|'local'}. SKILL.md exports CREATE_WORKFLOW_CONTEXT before invoking setup-workflow.sh; description is the user's original request (setup-workflow.sh has no positional slot for it); publish_intent mirrors --mode and gates the publishing stage.

optional.description: Create-vs-edit mode hint, description, and source_dir for edit

required.description: Approved design: suffix, target dir, stage decomposition, transition graph, inputs per stage

optional.description: Validator report from the previous iteration — every ❌ line must be addressed in this pass
User feedback from the most recent publish round — incorporate every point as the highest-priority change list for this iteration

required.description: Writer report — absolute path to the workflow directory and list of files produced
Writer report — target directory to publish
Publish report — contains the hub URL (cloud) or skip notice (local) to surface to the user
Writer report — has the absolute target directory, useful in both modes

optional.description: publish_intent — drives whether the user message highlights the hub URL or the local path
